title: simpa Vintage Style Mix Colour Glass Bottles with Swing Top Lids. Octagonal 1L Bottles - Set of 6
features: Introducing Simpa Vintage Style Assorted Colour Bottles with Swing Top Lids, a versatile solution perfect for both domestic and commercial use. Elevate your beverage presentation with these charming bottles, suitable for filling with water, wine, liquor, oil, beer, schnapps, or cordials. Crafted to exude vintage charm, these bottles seamlessly blend functionality with elegance, making them an ideal choice for any occasion.

Simpa offers a wide array of choices to suit your preferences, including round, square, and octagonal-shaped bottles, each available in assorted colors. Additionally, you can opt for bottles with embossed vertical stripes or embossed dots for added texture and visual appeal. With volume capacities ranging from 250ml to 1 liter, there's a perfect size for every need.

Enhance your beverage presentation with Simpa's assortment of colored bottles, adding a vibrant touch to your tabletop or bar. Paired with plain white lids, these bottles offer a clean and minimalist look, ensuring the focus remains on your beverages. The swing top lids provide a secure seal to preserve the freshness of your drinks, making these bottles as practical as they are stylish.

Crafted with care and precision, Simpa Vintage Style Assorted Colour Bottles are built to withstand the rigors of daily use. The high-quality glass construction ensures durability, while the swing top lids ensure a tight seal, keeping your beverages fresh for longer periods. Whether for home use or commercial purposes, these bottles are designed to meet your needs with reliability and style.

Simplify your beverage service with Simpa's set of 6 bottles, providing ample storage for your favorite drinks. Whether you're hosting a dinner party, running a bar, or stocking your pantry, this set ensures you have plenty of bottles on hand. Elevate your presentation and impress your guests with Simpa Vintage Style Assorted Colour Bottles, where versatility meets timeless charm.
description: Product Description Simpa 1L Clear Traditional Vintage Style Glass Bottles CLIP TOP PRESERVE BOTTLES Each glass bottle has an airtight, swing top lid, fantastic for preserving and storing liquids. This 6-pack of 1L flip top bottles offers excellent value and variety for all your recipes. REUSABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN Our glass bottles with lids can be used over and over again for a wide variety of beverages and condiments. Each 1 litre glass bottle is leak-proof and dishwasher safe. (Not suitable for boiled water) MULTI-PURPOSE CLIP TOP BOTTLES These glass bottles with stoppers are ideal as glass juice bottles, kombucha bottles, homebrew bottles, or for many other kinds of beverages and liquids, such as cooking oils, dressings, sauces and vinegar, or soda, water, cider, eggnog, and tea. Simpa 1L Clear Glass Bottles ~ Ideal for Domestic or Commercial Use ENJOY LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS ~ PERFECT BOTTLES FOR GIFTS Our thick and durable brewing bottles are designed for all-purpose use. They can be labelled for your pantry, displayed in your home, or gifted for party favours. Elevate your picnics and BBQs, offer guests a taste of luxury at your Bed & Breakfast, or bring it along to work or any occasions!
